Skills.Name: Cudgel
Skills.Description: Mastery of the maul, the mace, the cudgel — heavy-impact strikes that rattle bone and brain.

Powers.Name: Bludgeon
Powers.Description: Cudgel-class hits gain a substantial chance to apply Stunned. Stacks with the universal Bludgeoning class hook for stacking duration.

Powers.Name: Expertise
Powers.Description: +2 to-hit while wielding a Cudgel-class weapon (Mace / Warhammer / Cudgel / OldWorldPipe).

Powers.Name: Hammer
Powers.Description: Cudgel hits have a small chance to apply Broken to one of the defender's equipped items.

Powers.Name: Shattering Blows
Powers.Description: Cudgel hits have a chance to apply ShatterArmor — the defender's effective AV drops while their armor is cracked.

Powers.Name: Backswing
Powers.Description: When a Cudgel-weapon swing misses, you have a chance to immediately re-attack with the same weapon.

Powers.Name: Conk
Powers.Description: Active ability: targeted strike on an adjacent creature. The conk applies Stunned regardless of swing outcome. 10-turn cooldown. Requires a Cudgel weapon equipped.
